productDisplayName: Puma Men Drifter Road White Flip Flops
description: Walk through your everyday casual hours in absolute comfort in this pair of flip flops from puma. With an ergonomically curved and padded footbed, and a grippy outsole, stay safe and comfortable on all kinds of surfaces. Upper Wide synthetic leather straps with a toe separator and inner lining in twill tape Ergonomically padded footbed for all day comfort puma branding on the forefoot and heel Embossed honeycomb pattern on footbed Outsole TPR outsole with tyre tread pattern for absolute grip and traction Flip flop care Wipe surface with a clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
